item.title: M5 Max 早期跑分曝光：或登顶 Mac 性能榜
item.guid: M5-Max-早期跑分曝光：或登顶-Mac-性能榜
item.description:
According to 9to5Mac, the first Geekbench benchmark scores have been leaked ahead of the official launch of the new MacBook Pro equipped with the M5 Max chip. 据 9to5Mac 报道，在搭载 M5 Max 芯片的新款 MacBook Pro 正式开售前夕，首批 Geekbench 跑分数据已提前流出。

This test was conducted on a device with the model number "Mac17,7", corresponding to the 16-inch MacBook Pro set to launch on March 11. 本次测试基于一台型号为「Mac17,7」的设备，对应即将于 3 月 11 日上市的 16 英寸 MacBook Pro。

The M5 Max, equipped with an 18-core CPU, achieved a single-core score of 4268 and a multi-core score of 29233 in Geekbench. 搭载 18 核 CPU 的 M5 Max 在 Geekbench 中录得单核得分 4268 分、多核得分 29233 分。

Compared to the 16-core M4 Max (average single-core 3915 points, average multi-core 25702 points) found in the 2024 16-inch MacBook Pro, the single-core performance increased by approximately 9%, and multi-core performance by approximately 13.7%. 与 2024 款 16 英寸 MacBook Pro 所搭载的 16 核 M4 Max（单核均值 3915 分、多核均值 25702 分）相比，单核性能提升约 9%，多核性能提升约 13.7%。

In a horizontal comparison, the M5 Max's scores also surpassed all versions of the M4 Max equipped in this year's Mac Studio—the 14-core version scored 4015 in single-core and 23560 in multi-core, while the 16-core version scored 4028 in single-core and 26166 in multi-core. 横向对比来看，M5 Max 的成绩同样超越了今年 Mac Studio 所配备的 M4 Max 全部版本——14 核版本单核 4015 分、多核 23560 分，16 核版本单核 4028 分、多核 26166 分。

If the benchmark data for the final production version aligns with these figures, the M5 Max will simultaneously top both the single-core and multi-core charts on the Geekbench Mac leaderboard. 若最终量产版本的跑分数据与此吻合，M5 Max 将同时登顶 Geekbench Mac 榜单的单核与多核两项榜首。

In terms of GPU, the M5 Max achieved a Metal score of 232718 in this test, ranking second on the Geekbench Metal leaderboard, only behind the M3 Ultra (32-core CPU + 80-core GPU) found in this year's Mac Studio. GPU 方面，本次测试中 M5 Max 的 Metal 得分为 232718 分，在 Geekbench Metal 榜单中位列第二，仅次于今年 Mac Studio 所搭载的 M3 Ultra（32 核 CPU + 80 核 GPU）。

item.title: 烧钱建数据中心，甲骨文计划裁员数千人应对现金流压力
item.guid: 烧钱建数据中心，甲骨文计划裁员数千人应对现金流压力
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Oracle is planning large-scale layoffs affecting thousands of employees, as the company's massive investments in AI data center expansion are causing severe cash flow pressure. 据彭博社报道，甲骨文正计划大规模裁员，受影响员工人数达数千人，原因是公司在 AI 数据中心扩张上的巨额投入正引发严重的现金流压力。

The layoffs will affect multiple departments within the company and could begin as early as this month. According to sources, some of the eliminated positions belong to job categories that the company believes will gradually shrink due to AI development. The scale of these layoffs is expected to exceed Oracle's usual rolling layoffs. 裁员将波及公司多个部门，最快可能于本月内开始实施。据知情人士透露，部分被裁撤的岗位属于公司认为将因 AI 发展而逐渐萎缩的职能类别。本次裁员规模预计将超出 Oracle 以往常规的滚动式裁员范畴。

Meanwhile, Oracle announced internally this week that it would review a large number of vacant positions in its cloud computing division, effectively slowing down or even freezing the department's hiring process. As of the end of May 2025, Oracle's global workforce totaled approximately 162,000 people. 与此同时，甲骨文本周已在内部宣布，将对云计算部门的大量空缺职位展开审查，实际上相当于放缓乃至冻结了该部门的招聘进程。截至 2025 年 5 月底，甲骨文全球员工总数约为 16.2 万人。

Behind this large-scale layoff is the immense financial pressure Oracle is currently facing. Last December, Oracle disclosed that its capital expenditure forecast for fiscal year 2026 would increase by an additional $15 billion, beyond the $35 billion estimated in its Q1 earnings report. 这场大裁员的背后，是甲骨文正在承受的巨大财务压力。去年 12 月，Oracle 披露其 2026 财年资本支出预期将比第一季度财报时预估的 350 亿美元再增加 150 亿美元。

In February this year, the company further stated its plan to raise $45 billion to $50 billion throughout the year through debt and equity financing to support the continuous expansion of its cloud infrastructure, a move that intensified investors' concerns about its debt burden. 今年 2 月，公司进一步表示计划通过债务和股权融资方式，全年筹资 450 亿至 500 亿美元，以支撑云基础设施的持续扩张，此举加剧了投资者对其债务负担的担忧。

Wall Street analysts expect Oracle's cloud computing division's data center expenditures to continue to depress the company's cash flow for several years, with a positive turnaround not expected until around 2030. 华尔街分析师预计，Oracle 云计算部门的数据中心支出将在未来数年内持续压低公司现金流，直至 2030 年前后才有望转正。

The high upfront costs associated with AI are driving a wave of layoffs in the tech industry. Last year, Microsoft cut approximately 15,000 employees as spending on data centers and AI software development continued to climb; last week, Block co-founder Jack Dorsey announced layoffs of nearly half of his staff, citing AI for efficiency improvements. AI 带来的高额前期成本正在推动科技行业的裁员潮。微软去年在数据中心与 AI 软件开发支出持续攀升之际裁减了约 1.5 万名员工；上周，Block 公司联合创始人 Jack Dorsey 以 AI 提升效率为由，宣布裁减近一半员工。

item.title: MacBook Neo 桃粉色预售即告急，高管解释命名由来
item.guid: MacBook-Neo-桃粉色预售即告急，高管解释命名由来
item.description:
According to 9to5Mac, after pre-orders for Apple's entry-level laptop MacBook Neo opened, "Peach Pink" became the most popular choice and was the first to experience supply delays, with shipping dates pushed from the official release date of March 11 to between March 13 and 20. The remaining seven configurations are still available for delivery on the release day. 据 9to5Mac 报道，苹果入门级笔记本 MacBook Neo 预售开启后，「桃粉色」成为最受欢迎的选择，并率先出现供货延迟，发货日期从官方发布日 3 月 11 日推迟至 3 月 13 日至 20 日之间，其余七种配置仍可在发布当天收货。

Regarding the origin of the "Neo" naming, Apple's Mac Product Marketing Director Colleen Novielli stated in an interview with TechRadar that the name "Neo" was chosen to convey a youthful and vibrant product character. 关于「Neo」这一命名的由来，苹果 Mac 产品市场总监 Colleen Novielli 在接受 TechRadar 采访时称，「Neo」这一名称是为了传递一种年轻、充满活力的产品气质。

We wanted the name to sound fun, approachable, and fresh, truly fitting the spirit of this product.

She also emphasized that the MacBook Neo is a "product completely redesigned from the ground up," not a continuation of the previous 12-inch MacBook. 她同时强调，MacBook Neo 是一款「从零开始全新设计的产品」，而非此前 12 英寸 MacBook 的延续。

Another focus of external attention is why Apple did not equip this product with the newer A19 Pro. 外界关注的另一焦点，是苹果为何没有为这款产品搭载更新的 A19 Pro。

Some media outlets pointed out that Apple CEO Tim Cook's statements during the Q1 fiscal year 2026 earnings call might have provided the answer. 有媒体指出，苹果 CEO Tim Cook 在 2026 财年 Q1 财报电话会议上的表态或许已给出答案。

He noted at the time that shipments of the iPhone 17 Pro series were affected by tight capacity at advanced process nodes, and explicitly stated, "The supply of advanced nodes our SoC production relies on is constrained, and current supply chain flexibility is below normal levels." 他当时指出，受制于先进制程节点的产能紧张，iPhone 17 Pro 系列的出货量受到影响，并明确表示「我们的 SoC 生产所依赖的先进节点供应受限，当前供应链灵活性低于正常水平」。

The A19 Pro uses a packaging process similar to the A18 Pro, but features 12GB LPDDR5X memory. If it could be integrated, it would significantly boost the competitiveness of this entry-level Mac. However, facing high packaging costs and tight production capacity, Apple ultimately chose to compromise. A19 Pro 采用与 A18 Pro 相近的封装工艺，但内存来到了 12GB LPDDR5X 的规格，若能搭载，将显著提升这款入门 Mac 的竞争力，但面对高昂的封装成本与吃紧的产能，苹果最终选择了妥协。

Analyst Ming-Chi Kuo pointed out that the successor to the MacBook Neo is planned for release next year, at which point Apple will transition to TSMC's more advanced process nodes, potentially creating conditions for more powerful chips in entry-level models. 分析师郭明錤指出，MacBook Neo 的继任机型已计划于明年发布，届时苹果将转向台积电更先进的制程节点，有望为入门级机型搭载更强的芯片创造条件。

item.title: 🦞 龙虾首次走进手机，小米开启 miclaw 封闭测试
item.guid: 🦞-龙虾首次走进手机，小米开启-miclaw-封闭测试
item.description:
Yesterday, Xiaomi announced the launch of its mobile Agent product "Xiaomi miclaw" and initiated a small-scale closed beta test. This marks the first attempt in China to bring the OpenClaw application to mobile phones, built upon Xiaomi's MiMo large model, and initially supporting Xiaomi 17 series models. 昨天，小米宣布推出移动端 Agent 产品「Xiaomi miclaw」，并开启小范围封闭测试。这是国内首个将 OpenClaw 应用带到手机端的尝试，基于小米 MiMo 大模型构建，首批支持小米 17 系列机型。

Xiaomi miclaw focuses on verifying the execution capabilities of large models within Xiaomi's "Human-Car-Home All-Scenario Ecosystem" system, exploring the path for models to transition from "conversational ability" to "system-level execution ability." Xiaomi miclaw 聚焦验证大模型在小米「人车家全生态」系统中的执行能力，探索模型从「对话能力」向「系统级执行能力」的落地路径。

Unlike traditional AI assistants running within application sandboxes, miclaw operates as a system application, encapsulating over 50 system-level tools and ecosystem services. After user authorization, it can invoke first-party applications and ecosystem capabilities, autonomously selecting system-level tools to complete commands. 与运行在应用沙箱内的传统 AI 助手不同，miclaw 以系统应用身份运行，封装了 50+ 系统级工具与生态服务，可在用户授权后调用一方应用及生态能力，自主选择系统级工具完成指令。

    Regarding system-level capabilities, its core engine adopts an inference-execution loop mechanism, where the model autonomously determines which tool to call and what parameters to pass at each step. Tool execution features independent timeout protection, and the entire asynchronous architecture does not block system threads;

    Context management employs a three-level intelligent memory management system. Through round-based and token compression, it has been empirically shown to save 50% to 90% of token overhead;

    After user authorization, the system can read personal data such as SMS messages and calendars, enabling a complete "perceive → associate → judge → act" loop. For example, after recognizing a ticket purchase SMS, it can automatically string together 6 tools to complete travel preparations, or by analyzing consumption SMS messages from the past 3 months, it can detect duplicate subscriptions and provide unsubscribe suggestions;

    In terms of ecological interconnection, Xiaomi miclaw has implemented a complete Mijia protocol client, theoretically capable of controlling all IoT devices connected to Mijia by users , and also supports the MCP (Model Context Protocol) open standard and third-party application access SDK;

    In terms of self-evolution, the system possesses four meta-capabilities: file-level memory, sub-agent creation, MCP service configuration, and sandbox script execution (supporting Python/JavaScript), allowing it to continuously accumulate user preferences and experience during use;

    Regarding data security, conversation history, user configurations, and skill files are all stored locally on the device. The cloud only transmits current conversation messages during inference, and the data is encrypted; for sensitive operations such as sending SMS messages or creating schedules, a confirmation box will pop up before each execution.

This closed beta test is not open for public recruitment and is by invitation only. Xiaomi stated that since the product is still in the early exploration stage, and continuous optimization is underway in terms of stability, power consumption, and success rate in complex scenarios, it is not recommended to upgrade on daily primary devices. Users who obtain closed beta access will receive a specific version of the system push, which can be used after upgrading. 本次封测不公开招募，采用邀请制。小米表示，由于产品仍处于前沿探索阶段，在稳定性、功耗及复杂场景执行成功率方面持续优化中，不推荐在日常主力设备上升级。获得封测权限的用户将收到特定版本的系统推送，升级后方可使用。

🔗 Related reading: Xiaomi phones can now raise lobsters 🦞! After testing, I found that OpenClaw will usher in a good era for AI hardware 🔗 相关阅读： 小米手机可以养龙虾🦞了！实测后我发现OpenClaw会让AI硬件迎来一个好时代

item.title: 发改委：去年 AI 核心产业规模超 1.2 万亿元，「十五五」末目标破 10 万亿
item.guid: 发改委：去年-AI-核心产业规模超-1.2-万亿元，「十五五」末目标破-10-万亿
item.description:
According to reports from Xinhua News Agency and People's Daily, at the Fourth Session of the 14th National People's Congress held yesterday, relevant department heads made important statements regarding the development of the artificial intelligence industry. 据新华社、人民日报报道，在昨天举行的十四届全国人大四次会议上，有关部门负责人就人工智能产业发展作出重要表态。

Zheng Shanjie, Director of the National Development and Reform Commission, further disclosed future planning goals at yesterday's economic theme press conference: the "AI +" action will be deepened, and it is estimated that by the end of the "15th Five-Year Plan" (around 2030), the scale of AI-related industries will grow to over 10 trillion yuan. 国家发展改革委主任郑栅洁则在昨天的经济主题记者会上进一步披露了未来规划目标：将深化「人工智能 +」行动，预计「十五五」末（即 2030 年前后），人工智能相关产业规模将增长至 10 万亿元以上。

This means that, based on last year's core industry scale of 1.2 trillion yuan, the official expectation is that the overall industry scale will achieve an approximately 8-fold leapfrog growth within the next five years. 这意味着，在去年 1.2 万亿元核心产业规模的基础上，官方预期未来五年内整体产业规模将实现约 8 倍的跨越式增长。

Previously, Li Lecheng, Minister of Industry and Information Technology, stated on the first "Ministers' Passage" that artificial intelligence, this "key variable," is becoming a "strong increment" for high-quality economic development. Data shows that by 2025, the scale of China's core AI industry has exceeded 1.2 trillion yuan, with over 6,200 related enterprises. 此前，工业和信息化部部长李乐成首场「部长通道」上表示，人工智能这一「关键变量」正在成为经济高质量发展的「强劲增量」。数据显示，2025 年我国人工智能核心产业规模已超过 1.2 万亿元，相关企业数量超过 6200 家。

item.title: 魏建军就魏牌 V9X 海报抄袭公开致歉
item.guid: 魏建军就魏牌-V9X-海报抄袭公开致歉
item.description:
According to Bianews, Wei Jianjun, Chairman of Great Wall Motor, publicly apologized yesterday for the plagiarism incident involving the Wey V9X advertising poster. 据鞭牛士报道，长城汽车董事长魏建军昨天就魏牌 V9X 广告海报抄袭事件公开致歉。

The incident originated from a promotional poster released by Wey after officially announcing Wei Jianjun as the V9X spokesperson. 事件起因于魏牌官宣魏建军担任 V9X 代言人后发布的一张宣传海报。

Some netizens discovered that the poster was highly similar to a creative proposal they had previously made for the Range Rover Sport, and publicly posted on social media, stating, "The Range Rover Sport creative was something I did around this time last year, and the WEY material is what I saw today," while also calling on Wey to demand creative fees. 有网友发现该海报与其此前为路虎揽运所制作的创意方案高度雷同，并在社交平台公开发文指出「揽运的创意是我去年这会儿做的，WEY 的物料是我今天刷到的」，同时向魏牌喊话索要创意费用。

In his apology statement, Wei Jianjun admitted that, upon verification, "that poster was indeed plagiarized, with no excuses," and formally apologized to Land Rover, the original poster creator, and the general public. 魏建军在致歉声明中承认，经核查，「那张海报的确是抄袭的，不能有任何的辩解」，并向路虎、原版海报创作者及广大网友正式致歉。

He also stated that he and Great Wall Motor are willing to bear all legal and economic responsibilities arising from this incident. Wei Jianjun attributed the primary responsibility for this issue to his lax review and approval as a spokesperson, and promised to deeply reflect on and optimize internal management and review processes, "resolutely preventing plagiarism from happening again." 他同时表示，本人与长城汽车愿意承担此次事件带来的全部法律与经济责任。魏建军将此次问题的主要责任归咎于自己作为代言人审核把关不严，并承诺后续将对内部管理与审核流程进行深刻反思与优化，「坚决杜绝抄袭行为再次发生」。

Wei Jianjun also emphasized that Great Wall Motor has always adhered to the spirit of originality and welcomes continuous supervision from netizens and users. 魏建军还强调，长城汽车一直坚持原创精神，并欢迎广大网友和用户持续监督。

item.title: 曝奔驰启动「凤凰」平台，拟用吉利 GEEA 架构开发全球紧凑型电动车
item.guid: 曝奔驰启动「凤凰」平台，拟用吉利-GEEA-架构开发全球紧凑型电动车
item.description:
According to 36Kr, starting from late January this year, Mercedes-Benz management frequently appeared at Geely's Hangzhou Bay R&D Center, and subsequently, Geely management also went to Shanghai Jinqiao to further finalize cooperation directions with Mercedes-Benz. Insiders revealed that "in the past 1-2 years, Mercedes-Benz has been studying the 'cost magic' of Chinese cars." 据 36 氪报道，今年 1 月底起，奔驰管理层开始频繁出现在吉利杭州湾研发中心，随后吉利管理层也赴上海金桥与奔驰进一步敲定合作方向。知情人士透露，「最近 1~2 年，奔驰一直在研究中国汽车的成本魔法」。

Currently, both parties have reached a preliminary consensus: Mercedes-Benz will develop a new electric vehicle platform codenamed "Phoenix" based on Geely's GEEA 4.0 electronic and electrical architecture, expected to achieve mass production by 2030, covering compact models such as A-Class, B-Class, GLA, GLB, CLA, and sold globally. 目前双方已初步达成共识：奔驰将基于吉利 GEEA 4.0 电子电气架构，开发代号「凤凰」的全新电动车平台，预计 2030 年实现量产，届时将覆盖 A 级、B 级、GLA、GLB、CLA 等紧凑型车型并面向全球销售。

It is worth noting that the "Phoenix" project originally favored Zeekr's ZEEA architecture. Mercedes-Benz once used Zeekr 001 as its first teardown research object, internally evaluating it as having "good technology and materials, and significantly lower costs than Mercedes-Benz." 值得注意的是，「凤凰」项目最初属意的其实是极氪的 ZEEA 架构。奔驰曾将极氪 001 作为首款拆车研究对象，内部评价其「技术和用料不错，且成本比奔驰低非常多」。

However, ZEEA 3.0 is currently only for the Zeekr brand and has higher costs, so it was ultimately not selected. The more powerful and cost-effective GEEA 4.0 won out. The report also indicated that Mercedes-Benz is in preliminary talks with BYD to explore cooperation in the battery sector. 但 ZEEA 3.0 目前仅供极氪品牌使用且成本较高，最终未能入选，性能更强、成本更低的 GEEA 4.0 胜出。报道还指出，奔驰还在与比亚迪初步接洽，探讨电池领域合作。

In response, Mercedes-Benz stated that "the information is inaccurate," while Geely had not responded as of press time. 对此，奔驰回应称「信息存在不实」，吉利截至发稿未作回应。

item.title: 💡 雷军：5 年内限定场景可实现无人驾驶，开放道路「大撒把」路还很长
item.guid: 💡-雷军：5-年内限定场景可实现无人驾驶，开放道路「大撒把」路还很长
item.description:
According to The Paper, Lei Jun, Chairman and CEO of Xiaomi Group, recently stated in an interview that within the next 5 years, true autonomous driving can be achieved in some restricted areas; however, it will take more time for ordinary private cars to achieve full-scene "hands-off" driving on open roads. 据澎湃新闻报道，近日，小米集团董事长兼 CEO 雷军在接受采访时表示，未来 5 年内，在一些限定场所可以实现真正意义的无人驾驶；但若要普通私家车在开放道路全场景「大撒把」，则还需要更多时间。

He particularly emphasized that current intelligent driving is essentially still assisted driving and cannot replace human driving. When using assisted driving functions, drivers must keep both hands on the steering wheel, look straight ahead, and remain focused. 他特别强调，当下的智能驾驶本质上仍是辅助驾驶，无法取代人驾。 使用辅助驾驶功能时，驾驶员必须双手持方向盘、目视前方、保持专注。

In Lei Jun's view, the implementation of intelligent driving is not just a technical issue, but a systemic engineering challenge. Various technologies such as intelligent driving chips, algorithms, cockpits, and chassis require collaborative efforts across the entire industry chain; at the same time, road infrastructure, laws and regulations, and the driver's license training and assessment system also need to be upgraded simultaneously. 在雷军看来，智能驾驶的落地不仅是技术问题，更是系统性工程。智能驾驶芯片、算法、座舱、底盘等各项技术需要整个产业链协同攻关；与此同时，道路基础设施、法律法规、驾考培训与考核体系也都需要同步升级。

According to previous reports, Lei Jun suggested during this year's Two Sessions that efforts should be accelerated to establish automotive intelligence technical standards and optimize motor vehicle driving assessment items, increasing the weight of content related to intelligent connected vehicles in driver's license tests; 据此前报道，雷军在今年两会期间建议，应该加快建设汽车智能化技术标准和优化机动车驾驶考核项目，提升智能网联汽车相关内容在驾考中的权重；

At the same time, it is also necessary to research and promote a new generation of driving simulation training equipment that integrates functions such as scenario cognition, complex road condition simulation, and hazardous situation handling. 同时还需研发推广融合场景认知，复杂路况模拟，危险情境处置等功能的新一代驾驶模拟实训装备。

item.title: 曝蜜雪冰城试水现磨咖啡，延续高质平价策略
item.guid: 曝蜜雪冰城试水现磨咖啡，延续高质平价策略
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, Mixue Ice Cream & Tea is preparing to enter the freshly ground coffee market. 据界面新闻报道，蜜雪冰城正筹备进军现磨咖啡赛道。

The report cited informed sources as saying that Mixue Ice Cream & Tea's freshly ground coffee business is currently in the preliminary planning and pilot phase. In addition to equipping fully automatic coffee machines, the company plans to simultaneously promote a comprehensive upgrade of its coffee product line. 报道援引知情人士称，蜜雪冰城现磨咖啡业务目前处于前期规划试点阶段，计划除配备全自动咖啡机外，同步推进咖啡产品线的全面升级。

Specific measures include launching new coffee products, upgrading core ingredients such as coffee beans and milk, and generally continuing its consistent strategy of high-quality, affordable products. 具体措施包括推出咖啡新品、升级咖啡豆及牛奶等核心原料，整体仍将延续其一贯的高质平价产品策略。

Previously, most Mixue Ice Cream & Tea stores were not equipped with coffee machines. The coffee products in-store were all made from coffee powder, including Americano, Latte, Grape Iced Americano, etc., all of which were instant products, with no freshly ground coffee available. 此前，蜜雪冰城大多数门店并未配置咖啡机，店内咖啡产品均以咖啡粉制作，涵盖美式咖啡、拿铁咖啡、葡萄冰美式等，均属速溶产品，尚无现磨咖啡供应。

item.title: 西贝工资大面积缓发、贾国龙卸任 CEO
item.guid: 西贝工资大面积缓发、贾国龙卸任-CEO
item.description:
According to 36Kr, Xibei yesterday officially issued an internal notice clarifying the scope of delayed salary payments, covering almost all middle and grassroots management positions from city managers to stall supervisors. The notice also included a condition: employees who voluntarily resigned before 11 PM yesterday would have their salaries paid normally, unaffected by the delayed payment policy. 据36 氪报道，昨日，西贝内部正式下发通知，明确工资缓发范围，覆盖城市经理至档口主管几乎所有中层及基层管理岗位。通知同时附带一项条件：昨日 23 点前主动离职的员工，工资可正常发放，不受缓发政策影响。

Many employees interpreted this as the company indirectly forcing employees to resign voluntarily to avoid compensation. 多名员工将此解读为公司在变相逼迫员工主动离职以规避赔偿。

This directly contradicts Jia Guolong's public promise in January this year – he had stated on WeChat Moments that "all employees who have to leave will not be shortchanged a single cent in salary." 这与贾国龙今年 1 月的公开承诺形成直接矛盾——他曾在朋友圈表示「所有不得不离职的员工，工资一分钱不会差」。

It is worth noting that Jia Guolong himself has not publicly commented on this controversy, and several employees stated that they are unsure whether the aforementioned decision came from his personal will. 值得注意的是，贾国龙本人在此次风波中始终未公开表态，多位员工表示不清楚上述决策是否出自其本人意志。

Before the Spring Festival, Jia Guolong had stepped down as CEO of Xibei's main brand , with veteran Dong Junyi, who has over 30 years of experience, taking over the position. Previously, Xibei headquarters had initiated large-scale layoffs, with the number of employees expected to be reduced from over 500 to about 200, and over 150 stores nationwide have also been closed. 春节前，贾国龙已卸任西贝主品牌 CEO ，由从业逾 30 年的老将董俊义重新接掌该职。此前，西贝总部已启动大规模裁员，员工人数预计从逾 500 人压缩至约 200 人，全国门店亦已关闭逾 150 家。

Jia Guolong previously disclosed that from September last year to March this year, Xibei's cumulative losses would exceed 600 million yuan. 贾国龙此前披露，去年 9 月至今年 3 月，西贝累计亏损将超 6 亿元。

item.title: 「一刀未剪」，新版《呼啸山庄》定档 3 月 13 日
item.guid: 「一刀未剪」，新版《呼啸山庄》定档-3-月-13-日
item.description:
Yesterday, the new film "Wuthering Heights" officially announced the start of pre-sales in mainland China, scheduled for release next Friday (March 13), with the filmmakers claiming it is "uncut." 昨天，新版电影《呼啸山庄》正式宣布开启中国内地预售，定于下周五（3 月 13 日）公映，片方宣称「一刀未剪」。

The film's story is adapted from Emily Brontë's 1847 classic novel of the same name, focusing on the tense relationship between the Earnshaw and Linton families on the Yorkshire moors, and the fierce, destructive love between Catherine Earnshaw and the orphan Heathcliff. 影片故事改编自英国作家艾米莉·勃朗特 1847 年的同名经典小说，聚焦约克郡荒原上恩萧家族与林顿家族之间的紧张关系，以及凯瑟琳·恩萧与孤儿希斯克利夫之间激烈、毁灭性的爱情。

The film presents twisted and fervent emotions with an expressionistic aesthetic. The original soundtrack was created by British singer Charli XCX and was released simultaneously with its North American premiere (February 13). 影片以表现主义美学呈现扭曲狂热的情感，原声音乐由英国歌手 Charli XCX 创作，并于北美上映日（2 月 13 日）同步发行。

item.title: One Fun Thing｜鹅厂门前排起长龙，近千人齐聚腾讯大厦「云上养虾」
item.guid: One-Fun-Thing｜鹅厂门前排起长龙，近千人齐聚腾讯大厦「云上养虾」
item.description:
Yesterday, a long queue formed in front of Tencent's Shenzhen headquarters – nearly a thousand developers and AI enthusiasts came to Tencent Building and, with the assistance of Tencent Cloud engineers, completed the cloud installation of the open-source AI agent OpenClaw 昨日，腾讯深圳总部门前排起长龙——近千名开发者与 AI 爱好者来到腾讯大厦，在腾讯云工程师的协助下，通过腾讯轻量云 Lighthouse 完成了开源 AI 智能体 OpenClaw

cloud installation. A Tencent employee commented that the last time such a large crowd appeared was during the New Year's red packet distribution. 的云端安装。有腾讯员工表示，上一次出现如此大阵仗，还是新年发利是。

OpenClaw has garnered widespread attention for its support of private deployment, proactive execution, and plugin extensibility. However, its local deployment environment is complex to configure and has a high barrier to entry, with even paid on-site installation services appearing on domestic social platforms. OpenClaw 凭借支持私有化部署、主动执行与插件扩展能力引发广泛关注。然而，其本地部署环境配置复杂、门槛较高，国内社交平台甚至出现了上门收费代装服务。

This event, utilizing Tencent Cloud Lighthouse's one-click deployment solution, allows users to complete the installation for free in just 5 minutes, significantly reducing operational difficulty. 本次活动借助腾讯轻量云 Lighthouse 一键部署方案，用户仅需 5 分钟即可免费完成安装，极大降低了操作难度。

At 10 AM, over 80 enthusiasts from the first batch had already started queuing; by 11 AM, hundreds of reservation numbers were all distributed. Participants came from a wide range of places: local developers from Shenzhen's Longgang and Longhua districts traveled to Nanshan, and there were also cross-city users who came specifically from places like Hong Kong and Hangzhou. 上午 10 点，首批逾 80 位爱好者已开始排队；11 点，数百个预约号码全部发放完毕。参与者来源广泛：有从深圳龙岗、龙华赶赴南山的本地开发者，也有从香港、杭州等地专程前来的跨城用户。

Lighthouse continuously transforms complex operations into a 'zero-code' experience: configuration processes that originally required manual modification have become visual forms and switches, and high-quality plugins scattered across the global community have been integrated into the official curated marketplace, achieving 'one-click installation, one-click activation'. Lighthouse 持续将复杂操作转化为「零代码」体验：原本需手动修改的配置流程变为可视化表单与开关，分散于全球社区的优质插件也被整合进官方精选市场，实现「一键安装、一键启用」。

item.title: 周末看什么｜《暗黑新娘！》
item.description:
Yesterday, 'The Bride!' premiered in mainland cinemas simultaneously with North America. The film is directed by Oscar-nominated screenwriter and director Maggie Gyllenhaal, adapted from Mary Shelley's classic 1818 novel 'Frankenstein', and draws inspiration from the 1935 film 'Bride of Frankenstein'. 《暗黑新娘！》昨日起同步北美登陆内地院线。影片由奥斯卡提名编剧、导演玛吉·吉伦哈尔执导，改编自玛丽·雪莱 1818 年经典小说《科学怪人》，并从 1935 年电影《科学新娘》中汲取灵感。

The story is set in Chicago during the Great Depression of the 1930s: a lonely Frankenstein (played by Christian Bale) seeks the help of top scientist Dr. Euphronius (played by Annette Bening), and together they resurrect a murdered young woman, giving birth to a life named 'The Bride' (played by Jessie Buckley). 故事背景设定于 20 世纪 30 年代大萧条时期的芝加哥：孤独的弗兰肯斯坦（克里斯蒂安·贝尔 饰）寻求顶尖科学家尤弗罗尼乌斯博士（安妮特·贝宁 饰）的帮助，二人联手复活了一名遇害的年轻女子，由此诞生了名为「新娘」（杰西·巴克利 饰）的生命。

The Bride's awakening immediately triggers a series of murders, a pursuit by two Chicago detectives (Peter Sarsgaard, Penélope Cruz), and a social movement of female awakening sweeping the streets, exploring the power and emotional ties between creator and created. 新娘的觉醒随即引发连环命案、两名芝加哥警探（彼得·萨斯加德、佩内洛普·克鲁兹 饰）的追捕，以及一场席卷街头的女性觉醒社会运动，探讨创造者与被创造者之间的权力与情感羁绊。

In terms of critical reception, the film received a 62% fresh rating on Rotten Tomatoes and a Metacritic score of 56, showing a mixed overall reception. 口碑方面，影片在 Rotten Tomatoes 上获得 62% 的新鲜度，Metacritic 综合评分为 56 分，整体呈褒贬不一态势。

item.title: 买书不读指南｜《海的呼吸：碳循环与气候演变的海洋史》
item.guid: 买书不读指南｜《海的呼吸：碳循环与气候演变的海洋史》
item.description:
'The Ocean's Breath: A Marine History of the Carbon Cycle and Climate Evolution' is a popular science work by Dutch paleoceanographer Eelco J. Rohling. The book centers on 4.4 billion years of ocean evolution, covering major geological and climatic events such as Snowball Earth, the Permian-Triassic extinction event, the breakup and drift of the Pangea supercontinent, and contemporary global warming. 《海的呼吸：碳循环与气候演变的海洋史》是荷兰古海洋学家埃尔科·J. 罗林（Eelco J. Rohling）的科普著作，全书以 44 亿年的海洋演化史为主轴，涵盖雪球地球、二叠纪末生物大灭绝、盘古超大陆分裂漂移直至当代全球变暖等重大地质气候事件。

Rohling's core argument is that the ocean is the most important regulator of Earth's climate system and the world's largest carbon reservoir—its carbon content is 15 times the total amount in the atmosphere and all living and dead organisms on Earth; since the Industrial Revolution, the ocean has absorbed over one-third of human-emitted carbon dioxide. 罗林的核心论点在于：海洋是地球气候系统最重要的调节器，也是全球最大的碳储存库——其碳含量是大气与地球上所有生物及死亡有机体总量的 15 倍；自工业革命以来，海洋已吸收人类排放超三分之一的二氧化碳。

Rohling thus issues a warning: 'How much longer can the ocean help humanity in this way?' The answer remains unknown for now. 罗林以此发出警示：「海洋还能以这种方式帮助人类多长时间？」答案目前仍未可知。

The table of contents has eight chapters: Introduction, Origins, Factors Influencing Climate Change, Snowball Earth and the Cambrian Explosion, Ocean Acidification, The Age of Reptiles, Winter is Coming, and The Future Ocean and Climate. The structure is clear, balancing profound geological history with current climate crisis issues. 目录共八章，依次为引言、起源、气候变化的影响因素、雪球地球和生命大爆发、海洋酸化、爬行动物时代、冬天来了，以及未来的海洋和气候，脉络清晰，兼顾深远的地质历史与当下的气候危机议题。

item.title: 游戏推荐｜《双影奇境》国行版定档 4 月 3 日
item.guid: 游戏推荐｜《双影奇境》国行版定档-4-月-3-日
item.description:
Yesterday, the official Weibo account for the co-op game 'It Takes Two' posted to celebrate the game's first anniversary and officially announced that the Chinese mainland version is set to release on April 3rd. 昨天，双人游戏《双影奇境》官微发文庆祝游戏上线一周年，并正式宣布国行版定档 4 月 3 日。

Developed by Hazelight Studios, the creators of 'It Takes Two', this title launched on PS5, Xbox Series, and PC platforms on March 6th last year. Sales surpassed 1 million units within 2 days of release, and by May last year, cumulative sales had exceeded 4 million units. 本作由《双人成行》开发商 Hazelight Studios 打造，于去年 3 月 6 日登陆 PS5、Xbox Series 及 PC 平台，发售 2 天内销量即突破 100 万份，截至去年 5 月累计销量已超 400 万份。

The game supports local co-op, online co-op, and cross-platform play, blending sci-fi and fantasy elements. Players can traverse multiple distinct worlds to experience level challenges. 游戏支持本地合作、在线合作与跨平台联机，融合科幻与奇幻元素，玩家可穿梭于多个风格迥异的世界中体验关卡挑战。

Regarding the Chinese mainland version, Hazelight game director Josef Fares announced to players at a PlayStation China live sharing session held last October that the Chinese version would be coming soon and confirmed that the game would be available on the Chinese mainland PS5 and PS5 Pro. 国行版方面，Hazelight 游戏总监 Josef Fares 曾在去年 10 月举行的 PlayStation 中国直播分享会上向玩家宣布国行版即将推出，并确认游戏将登陆国行版 PS5 及 PS5 Pro。

'It Takes Two' passed import game approval and obtained its license in September last year, covering client, console (PS5) game, and composite carrier versions. 《双影奇境》已于去年 9 月通过进口游戏审批并取得版号，涵盖客户端、游戏机（PS5）游戏及复合载体版本。
